overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage showing a warrior character in red robes walking through a snowy mountain landscape with traditional East Asian wooden temple gates. The character traverses snow-covered paths, passes through large wooden torii structures, and encounters other figures in a serene winter forest setting.

scene_state.functional_zone: snowy mountain approach to large wooden temple gate

events.description: character passes underneath the large wooden torii gate structure
character makes a slight left turn while continuing forward

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through deep snow toward and through the large wooden gate

entered.detail: massive weathered wooden gate structure with curved roof tiles and thick support beams
tall stone stupa-like lantern covered in snow

segments.scene_description: The character begins near a massive wooden torii gate in a snowy mountain setting. Walking steadily through deep snow, the character passes underneath the gate structure around the 6-second mark, continuing along the path as the gate recedes behind. Stone lanterns and snow-laden trees frame the approach.

scene_state.functional_zone: snowy forest trail with stone monuments

events.description: stone statues become visible flanking the path on both sides
NPC figure appears standing near the path on the right side
approaching the second wooden gate with ornate curved roof

agents.ego_description: walking along the forest path toward the second gate, passing stone monuments

notable_agents.action: hooded figure standing motionless near the gate entrance, observing the approaching character

entered.detail: smaller wooden gate structure with ornate curved roof and detailed carvings
weathered stone figures flanking the snowy path
snow-covered mountain peaks visible through the trees

segments.scene_description: Moving through a denser forest section, the character passes stone statues flanking the path. An NPC figure stands motionless near the route on the right. The path leads toward a second ornate wooden gate, with snow-covered mountain peaks becoming visible through the trees ahead.

events.description: passing through the second wooden gate into open terrain
character navigates around a fallen log in the snow

agents.ego_description: walking through the gate and crossing the open snow field toward distant structures

entered.detail: snow-covered fallen tree trunks lying across the path
small traditional building with dark roof in the distance

segments.scene_description: Passing through the second gate, the environment opens into a wide snowy clearing. The character navigates around fallen logs while heading toward a small wooden structure visible in the distance. The mountain range shifts to the left side of the frame as the character advances.

events.description: second NPC figure appears to the left near the tree line
character slows down while approaching the wooden structure

agents.ego_description: slowly approaching the small wooden building while observing the surroundings

notable_agents.action: figure in dark robes standing near the tree line, facing away from the path

segments.scene_description: The character slows while approaching a small wooden shrine building in the open snow field. Another NPC stands near the trees to the left, facing away from the path. The building grows larger in the frame as the character advances carefully through the deep snow.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a secluded snowy mountain pass that gradually opens into a wide, serene clearing. It begins with the character walking through deep snow beneath a massive wooden torii gate, framed by stone lanterns and snow-laden trees. As the character moves deeper into a dense forest, the path is flanked by stone statues and a motionless figure before leading toward a second ornate gate that reveals distant mountain peaks through the branches. The scene then expands into a wide snowy field where the character navigates around fallen logs, with the mountain range shifting to the left of the frame. Finally, the camera advances carefully through the deep snow toward a small wooden shrine building as another figure stands silently among the nearby trees.
